---
title: "Stat 331/531: Midterm Exam Short Answer"
date: now
author: "Aiden Rodriguez"
format: 
  pdf:
    embed-resources: true
editor: source
execute: 
  error: true
  echo: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

wage_data  <- read_csv("us-minimum-wage-data.csv")
party_data <- read_csv("us-party-data.csv")

wage_clean <- wage_data |>
  mutate(
    year  = as.integer(str_sub(Effective.Date, 1, 4)),
    state = str_to_title(State)
  ) |>
  select(-State, -Effective.Date)

party_clean <- party_data |>
  mutate(state = str_to_title(state))

combined <- wage_clean |>
  left_join(party_clean, by = c("state", "year")) |>
  select(year, state, everything())

glimpse(combined)
```
